message:
feat(ui): add Explorer scatter plot, area-filled line chart, and Ctrl+S stats bar shortcut

Major upgrade to the Analytics Explorer view:

Scatter plot (bottom 35% of Explorer):
- Renders session-level tokens-vs-messages scatter using HalfBlock canvas
- Color-codes points by efficiency ratio relative to average: orange (high
  token/msg ratio), green (efficient), blue (average)
- Draws crosshair guides at mean message count and mean token total
- Shows header with point count and average tok/msg efficiency metric
- Gracefully hidden when terminal too small (<10h or <50w) or no data

Area-filled line chart (top 65% of Explorer):
- Replaces the previous simple line chart with a Braille-canvas renderer
  that fills the area under the primary series with a dimmed color
- Adds peak marker (yellow diamond), average guide line (gray), and
  annotation bar showing peak value+date, average, and trend percentage
- Overlay series rendered as colored lines with periodic markers
- Full axis rendering with Y-axis labels (auto-formatted: compact numbers
  for counts, $X.XX for cost) and X-axis date labels with smart spacing
- Falls back to the original FtuiLineChart for very small terminals

Stats bar shortcut:
- Adds `Ctrl+S` (STATS_BAR) to the keyboard shortcut registry
- Updates shortcut tests for the new binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
